title: dvirov's Enchantments
description: simple datapack with new enchantments and curses
body:
Simple datapack/mod that adds some enchantments i think make the game more interesting and fun


if you feel like some encantments not suit you and want to remove them you can easily remove them from the folder [dvirov-enchantments > data > dvirov_enchantments > enchantment]

if you using the mod version use program like winrar to open the .jar file


more to come...



<details>
<summary>Enchantments info :</summary>

### Step Assist 
type: non treasure

Supported Items: Leggings

Exclusive: none

Max level: 1

descripton: Gives the user +0.5 step height 


### Curse of the Dwarves 

type: curse, non treasure

Supported Items: armor

Exclusive: Curse of the Giants

Max level: 1

descripton: Reduces the size of the player


### Curse of the Giants 

type: curse, non treasure

Supported Items: armor

Exclusive: Curse of the Dwarves

Max level: 1

descripton: Increase the size of the player

### Fireborn 

type: Treasure

Supported Items: armor

Exclusive: none

Max level: 1

descripton: Gives the user immunity to fire at the cost of a weakness to cold blocks
(player get damage from water,ice,snow)

</details>

For any suggestion or issue [discord](https://discord.gg/gXSEPRdydK)


Have fun
